data.title: LG's endangered species campaign features pygmy owl in NY Times Square billboard, raising awareness.
data.description: Englewood Cliffs, N.J., July 18, 2025 - LG Electronics has launched a new campaign in New York Times Square showcasing the cactus ferruginous pygmy-owl, an endangered species. The community was invited to vote for the animal to be featured on a 3D anamorphic billboard, drawing attention to its conservation. This initiative aims to raise awareness about the pygmy owl and its plight, with the billboard serving as a platform to highlight the issue. LG's efforts underscore the importance of wildlife conservation, with this campaign bringing the pygmy owl's struggles into focus for a wide audience.

data.title: Small Satellites Market Forecast 2025-2033 from ResearchAndMarkets.com, explores democratized space access with quantitative forecasts and technology trends.
data.description: A recent report titled "Small Satellites - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The study delves into the impact of compact spacecraft on space accessibility, benefiting established companies and new market participants. It provides quantitative market projections and qualitative technology evaluations, highlighting trends like satellite constellations, artificial intelligence incorporation, and sustainable practices in space. This report presents valuable insights for stakeholders in the industry.

data.title: Technetium-99m market projected to reach $6.29 billion by 2031, growing at 3.9% CAGR due to chronic diseases and imaging advancements.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, it was reported that the global technetium-99m market is experiencing significant growth due to the increasing occurrence of chronic diseases and advancements in nuclear imaging techniques. A recent report by The Insight Partners highlighted this trend, indicating a rise in demand for technetium-99m. The market is expected to continue expanding as more healthcare facilities adopt nuclear imaging technologies. This growth is driven by the need for more effective diagnostic tools, with the market currently valued at [specific number] and projected to reach [specific number] by [year].

data.title: Crypto investor James Howells loses $725 million fortune after accidentally throwing away hard drive with passkeys.
data.description: British cryptocurrency investor James Howells accidentally threw away a hard drive containing the passkeys to his $725 million fortune in a landfill. He had bought 8,000 Bitcoins in 2013 when they were around $950 each, amassing a fortune of $7.6 million by year's end. A documentary is being made about his quest to recover the hard drive. The incident occurred during a routine cleaning at his house in England, with Howells claiming his girlfriend disposed of it. The hard drive's value has since skyrocketed, leading to much interest in the story.

data.title: Bit Digital purchases 19,683 ETH, totalling 120,306 ETH, with $67.3M from an offering. It is now one of the largest institutional holders of Ethereum. CEO believes ETH is essential for the digital financial future.
data.description: Bit Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: BTBT) announced the acquisition of 19,683 Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), increasing its total Ethereum holdings to around 120,306 ETH. This purchase was made possible by the recent completion of a $67.3 million registered direct offering to institutional investors. With this transaction, Bit Digital solidifies its position as one of the largest institutional holders of Ethereum among public companies. CEO Sam Tabar highlighted the significance of this move, stating that the company now holds approximately 120,000 ETH, positioning it as a major player in the institutional Ethereum treasury space within public markets. Tabar emphasized Ethereum's importance in shaping the future of digital financial infrastructure. This acquisition by Bit Digital is in line with the growing trend of both public and private companies integrating digital assets, including Ethereum, alongside Bitcoin into their portfolios.

data.title: Jesta I.S. introduces enhanced customer care platform for retail clients, improving service and engagement. #customerexperience
data.description: A new customer care and intelligence platform has been launched by Jesta in Montreal, available for all its retail and supply chain software clients. This dynamic platform offers various tools and features to enhance customer service and provide valuable insights, aiming to improve overall business operations. The platform is now accessible to a large number of clients, offering a potential boost in customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
